Lemma apply_sub_under : forall σ1 σ2 t,
  (forall x, σ1 x = σ2 x) ->
  apply_sub σ1 t = apply_sub σ2 t.
Proof.
  intros σ1 σ2 t. revert σ1 σ2.
  induction t as [x|i|A IHA B IHB|A IHA t IHt|t IHt u IHu|
                 A IHA t IHt|I|I c args IHargs|I scrut IHscrut C IHC brs IHbrs];
    intros σ1 σ2 H; simpl.
  - f_equal. apply H.
  - reflexivity.
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IHA _ _ H).
    + apply (IHB _ _). intro n. destruct n; simpl.
      * reflexivity.
      * unfold shift1, shift. f_equal. apply H.
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IHA _ _ H).
    + apply (IHt _ _). intro n. destruct n; simpl.
      * reflexivity.
      * unfold shift1, shift. f_equal. apply H.
  - f_equal; [apply (IHt _ _ H) | apply (IHu _ _ H)].
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IHA _ _ H).
    + apply (IHt _ _). intro n. destruct n; simpl.
      * reflexivity.
      * unfold shift1, shift. f_equal. apply H.
  - reflexivity.
  - f_equal. apply map_ext_in. intros a Hin. eapply IHargs; eauto.
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IHscrut _ _ H).
    + apply (IHC _ _). intro n. destruct n; simpl.
      * reflexivity.
      * unfold shift1, shift. f_equal. apply H.
    + apply map_ext_in. intros b Hin. eapply IHbrs; eauto.
Qed.

Lemma apply_sub_under : forall σ1 σ2 t,
  (forall x, σ1 x = σ2 x) ->
  apply_sub σ1 t = apply_sub σ2 t.
Proof.
  intros σ1 σ2 t. revert σ1 σ2.
  induction t as [x|i|A IHA B IHB|A IHA t IHt|t IHt u IHu|
                 A IHA t IHt|I|I c args|I scrut IHscrut C IHC brs];
    intros σ1 σ2 H; simpl.
  - f_equal. apply H.
  - reflexivity.
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IHA _ _ H).
    + apply (IHB _ _). intro n. destruct n; simpl.
      * reflexivity.
      * unfold shift1, shift. f_equal. apply H.
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IHA _ _ H).
    + apply (IHt _ _). intro n. destruct n; simpl.
      * reflexivity.
      * unfold shift1, shift. f_equal. apply H.
  - f_equal; [apply (IHt _ _ H) | apply (IHu _ _ H)].
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IHA _ _ H).
    + apply (IHt _ _). intro n. destruct n; simpl.
      * reflexivity.
      * unfold shift1, shift. f_equal. apply H.
  - reflexivity.
  - induction args as [|a args']; simpl; auto.
    f_equal.
    + apply (apply_sub_under σ1 σ2 a). exact H.
    + apply IHargs'.
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IHscrut _ _ H).
    + apply (IHC _ _). intro n. destruct n; simpl.
      * reflexivity.
      * unfold shift1, shift. f_equal. apply H.
    + induction brs as [|b brs']; simpl; auto.
      f_equal.
      * apply (apply_sub_under σ1 σ2 b). exact H.
      * apply IHbrs'.
Qed.

Lemma rename_under : forall ξ1 ξ2 t,
  (forall x, ξ1 x = ξ2 x) ->
  rename ξ1 t = rename ξ2 t.
Proof.
  intros ξ1 ξ2 t. revert ξ1 ξ2.
  induction t as [x|i|A IHA B IHB|A IHA t IHt|t IHt u IHu|
                 A IHA t IHt|I|I c args IHargs|I scrut IHscrut C IHC brs IHbrs];
    intros ξ1 ξ2 H; simpl.
  - f_equal. apply H.
  - reflexivity.
  - f_equal.
    + apply IHA. exact H.
    + apply IHB. intro x0. destruct x0; simpl.
      * reflexivity.
      * f_equal. apply H.
  - f_equal.
    + apply IHA. exact H.
    + apply IHt. intro x0. destruct x0; simpl.
      * reflexivity.
      * f_equal. apply H.
  - f_equal; [apply IHt | apply IHu]; auto.
  - f_equal.
    + apply IHA. exact H.
    + apply IHt. intro x0. destruct x0; simpl.
      * reflexivity.
      * f_equal. apply H.
  - reflexivity.
  - f_equal. apply map_ext_in. intros a Hin.
    rewrite Forall_forall in IHargs. apply IHargs with (x:=a); auto.
  - f_equal.
    + apply IHscrut. exact H.
    + apply IHC. intro x0. destruct x0; simpl.
      * reflexivity.
      * f_equal. apply H.
    + apply map_ext_in. intros b Hin.
      rewrite Forall_forall in IHbrs. apply IHbrs with (x:=b); auto.
Qed.

Lemma rename_under : forall ξ1 ξ2 t,
  (forall x, ξ1 x = ξ2 x) ->
  rename ξ1 t = rename ξ2 t.
Proof.
  intros ξ1 ξ2 t. revert ξ1 ξ2.
  induction t as [x|i|A IHA B IHB|A IHA t IHt|t IHt u IHu|
                 A IHA t IHt|I|I c args|I scrut IHscrut C IHC brs];
    intros ξ1 ξ2 H; simpl.
  - f_equal. apply H.
  - reflexivity.
  - f_equal.
    + apply IHA. exact H.
    + apply IHB. intro x0. destruct x0; simpl.
      * reflexivity.
      * f_equal. apply H.
  - f_equal.
    + apply IHA. exact H.
    + apply IHt. intro x0. destruct x0; simpl.
      * reflexivity.
      * f_equal. apply H.
  - f_equal; [apply IHt | apply IHu]; auto.
  - f_equal.
    + apply IHA. exact H.
    + apply IHt. intro x0. destruct x0; simpl.
      * reflexivity.
      * f_equal. apply H.
  - reflexivity.
  - induction args as [|a args']; simpl; auto.
    f_equal.
    + apply (rename_under ξ1 ξ2 a). exact H.
    + apply IHargs'.
  - f_equal.
    + apply IHscrut. exact H.
    + apply IHC. intro x0. destruct x0; simpl.
      * reflexivity.
      * f_equal. apply H.
    + induction brs as [|b brs']; simpl; auto.
      f_equal.
      * apply (rename_under ξ1 ξ2 b). exact H.
      * apply IHbrs'.
Qed.

Lemma rename_under : forall ξ1 ξ2 t,
  (forall x, ξ1 x = ξ2 x) ->
  rename ξ1 t = rename ξ2 t.
Proof.
  fix IH 4. intros ξ1 ξ2 t H.
  destruct t; simpl.
  - f_equal. apply H.
  - reflexivity.
  - f_equal.
    + apply IH with (t:=t1). exact H.
    + apply IH with (t:=t2). intro x0. destruct x0; simpl.
      * reflexivity.
      * f_equal. apply H.
  - f_equal.
    + apply IH with (t:=t1). exact H.
    + apply IH with (t:=t2). intro x0. destruct x0; simpl.
      * reflexivity.
      * f_equal. apply H.
  - f_equal; [apply IH with (t:=t1) | apply IH with (t:=t2)]; auto.
  - f_equal.
    + apply IH with (t:=t1). exact H.
    + apply IH with (t:=t2). intro x0. destruct x0; simpl.
      * reflexivity.
      * f_equal. apply H.
  - reflexivity.
  - induction l; simpl; auto.
    f_equal.
    + apply IH with (t:=a). exact H.
    + apply IHl.
  - f_equal.
    + apply IH with (t:=t1). exact H.
    + apply IH with (t:=t2). intro x0. destruct x0; simpl.
      * reflexivity.
      * f_equal. apply H.
    + induction l; simpl; auto.
      f_equal.
      * apply IH with (t:=a). exact H.
      * apply IHl.
Qed.

  induction t; intros ξ1 ξ2 H; simpl.

  - f_equal.
    + apply IHt1. exact H.

Qed.

  (forall x, σ1 x = σ2 x) ->
  apply_sub σ1 t = apply_sub σ2 t.
Proof.
  fix IH 4. intros σ1 σ2 t H.
  destruct t; simpl.
  - f_equal. apply H.
  - reflexivity.
  - f_equal.
    + apply IH with (t:=t1). exact H.
    + apply IH with (t:=t2). intro n. destruct n; simpl.
      * reflexivity.

  - f_equal.
    + apply IH with (t:=t1). exact H.

      * reflexivity.

    + apply IH with (t:=t1). exact H.
    + apply IH with (t:=t2). intro n. destruct n; simpl.
      * reflexivity.
      * unfold shift1, shift. f_equal. apply H.
  - reflexivity.
  - induction l; simpl; auto.
    f_equal.
    + apply IH with (t:=a). exact H.
    + apply IHl.
  - f_equal.
    + apply IH with (t:=t1). exact H.
    + apply IH with (t:=t2). intro n. destruct n; simpl.
      * reflexivity.
      * unfold shift1, shift. f_equal. apply H.
    + induction l; simpl; auto.
      f_equal.
      * apply IH with (t:=a). exact H.
      * apply IHl.
Qed.

  : rename ξ1 t = rename ξ2 t.
Proof.
  destruct t; simpl.
  - f_equal. apply H.
  - reflexivity.
  - f_equal.
    + apply rename_under_fix with (t:=t1). exact H.
    + apply rename_under_fix with (t:=t2). intro x0. destruct x0; simpl.
      * reflexivity.
      * f_equal. apply H.
  - f_equal.
    + apply rename_under_fix with (t:=t1). exact H.

      * reflexivity.

  - reflexivity.
  - induction l; simpl; auto.
    f_equal.

  : rename ξ1 t = rename ξ2 t.

  destruct t as [x|i|A B|A t|t u|A t|I|I c args|I scrut C brs]; simpl.
  - f_equal. apply H.

    + apply rename_under_fix with (t:=A). exact H.

      * reflexivity.

  - f_equal.
    + apply rename_under_fix with (t:=A). exact H.
    + apply rename_under_fix with (t:=t). intro x0. destruct x0; simpl.
      * reflexivity.
      * f_equal. apply H.
  - f_equal; [apply rename_under_fix with (t:=t) | apply rename_under_fix with (t:=u)]; auto.
  - f_equal.
    + apply rename_under_fix with (t:=A). exact H.

      * reflexivity.

      f_equal.
      * apply rename_under_fix with (t:=b). exact H.
      * apply IHbrs'.
Qed.

    + apply apply_sub_under_fix with (t:=B). intro n. destruct n; simpl.

  - f_equal.
    + apply apply_sub_under_fix with (t:=A). exact H.
    + apply apply_sub_under_fix with (t:=t). intro n. destruct n; simpl.

  - f_equal; [apply apply_sub_under_fix with (t:=t) | apply apply_sub_under_fix with (t:=u)]; auto.

Fixpoint rename_under (ξ1 ξ2 : nat -> nat) (t : tm) (H : forall x, ξ1 x = ξ2 x) {struct t}
  : rename ξ1 t = rename ξ2 t :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => f_equal tVar (H x)
  | tSort i => eq_refl
  | tPi A B =>
      f_equal2 tPi
        (rename_under ξ1 ξ2 A H)
        (rename_under
           (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ1 x) end)
           (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ2 x) end)
           B
           (fun x => match x with
                     | 0 => eq_refl
                     | S n => f_equal S (H n)
                     end))
  | tLam A t =>
      f_equal2 tLam
        (rename_under ξ1 ξ2 A H)
        (rename_under
           (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ1 x) end)
           (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ2 x) end)
           t
           (fun x => match x with
                     | 0 => eq_refl
                     | S n => f_equal S (H n)
                     end))
  | tApp t u =>
      f_equal2 tApp
        (rename_under ξ1 ξ2 t H)
        (rename_under ξ1 ξ2 u H)
  | tFix A t =>
      f_equal2 tFix
        (rename_under ξ1 ξ2 A H)
        (rename_under
           (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ1 x) end)
           (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ2 x) end)
           t
           (fun x => match x with
                     | 0 => eq_refl
                     | S n => f_equal S (H n)
                     end))
  | tInd I => eq_refl
  | tRoll I c args =>
      f_equal (fun args => tRoll I c args)
        (rename_under_list ξ1 ξ2 args H)
  | tCase I scrut C brs =>
      f_equal2 (tCase I)
        (rename_under ξ1 ξ2 scrut H)
        (f_equal2 pair
           (rename_under
              (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ1 x) end)
              (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ2 x) end)
              C
              (fun x => match x with
                        | 0 => eq_refl
                        | S n => f_equal S (H n)
                        end))
           (rename_under_list ξ1 ξ2 brs H))
  end
with rename_under_list (ξ1 ξ2 : nat -> nat) (args : list tm) (H : forall x, ξ1 x = ξ2 x) {struct args}
  : map (rename ξ1) args = map (rename ξ2) args :=
  match args with
  | nil => eq_refl
  | a :: args' =>
      f_equal2 cons
        (rename_under ξ1 ξ2 a H)
        (rename_under_list ξ1 ξ2 args' H)
  end.

Fixpoint rename_under_fix (ξ1 ξ2 : nat -> nat) (t : tm) (H : forall x, ξ1 x = ξ2 x) {struct t}
  : rename ξ1 t = rename ξ2 t.
Proof.
  destruct t as [x|i|A B|A t|t u|A t|I|I c args|I scrut C brs]; simpl.
  - f_equal. apply H.
  - reflexivity.
  - f_equal.
    + apply rename_under_fix with (t:=A). exact H.
    + apply rename_under_fix with (t:=B). intro x0. destruct x0; simpl.
      * reflexivity.
      * f_equal. apply H.
  - f_equal.
    + apply rename_under_fix with (t:=A). exact H.
    + apply rename_under_fix with (t:=t). intro x0. destruct x0; simpl.
      * reflexivity.
      * f_equal. apply H.
  - f_equal; [apply rename_under_fix with (t:=t) | apply rename_under_fix with (t:=u)]; auto.
  - f_equal.
    + apply rename_under_fix with (t:=A). exact H.
    + apply rename_under_fix with (t:=t). intro x0. destruct x0; simpl.
      * reflexivity.
      * f_equal. apply H.
  - reflexivity.
  - f_equal; try reflexivity.
    apply map_ext_in. intros a Hin.
    apply rename_under_fix with (t:=a). exact H.
  - f_equal.
    + apply rename_under_fix with (t:=scrut). exact H.
    + apply rename_under_fix with (t:=C). intro x0. destruct x0; simpl.
      * reflexivity.
      * f_equal. apply H.
    + apply map_ext_in. intros b Hin.
      apply rename_under_fix with (t:=b). exact H.
Qed.

Lemma rename_under : forall ξ1 ξ2 t,
  (forall x, ξ1 x = ξ2 x) ->
  rename ξ1 t = rename ξ2 t.
Proof.
  apply rename_under_fix.
Qed.

Definition rename_under : forall ξ1 ξ2 t, (forall x, ξ1 x = ξ2 x) -> rename ξ1 t = rename ξ2 t.
Proof.
  fix IH 4.
  intros ξ1 ξ2 t H.
  destruct t; simpl.
  - f_equal. apply H.
  - reflexivity.
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IH ξ1 ξ2 t1 H).

                (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ2 x0) end)
                t2).
      intro x0. destruct x0; simpl; auto. f_equal. apply H.
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IH ξ1 ξ2 t1 H).
    + apply (IH (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ1 x0) end)
                (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ2 x0) end)
                t2).
      intro x0. destruct x0; simpl; auto. f_equal. apply H.
  - f_equal; [apply (IH _ _ t1 H) | apply (IH _ _ t2 H)].
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IH ξ1 ξ2 t1 H).
    + apply (IH (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ1 x0) end)
                (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ2 x0) end)
                t2).
      intro x0. destruct x0; simpl; auto. f_equal. apply H.
  - reflexivity.
  - induction l; simpl; auto.
    f_equal.
    + apply (IH _ _ a H).
    + apply IHl.
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IH ξ1 ξ2 t1 H).
    + apply (IH (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ1 x0) end)
                (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ2 x0) end)

    + induction l; simpl; auto.

Fixpoint rename_under (ξ1 ξ2 : nat -> nat) (t : tm) (H : forall x, ξ1 x = ξ2 x) {struct t}
  : rename ξ1 t = rename ξ2 t :=
  match t with

      f_equal2 tPi

        (rename_under
           (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ1 x) end)
           (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ2 x) end)
           B
           (fun x => match x with
                     | 0 => eq_refl
                     | S n => f_equal S (H n)
                     end))
  | tLam A t =>
      f_equal2 tLam
        (rename_under ξ1 ξ2 A H)
        (rename_under
           (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ1 x) end)
           (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ2 x) end)
           t
           (fun x => match x with
                     | 0 => eq_refl
                     | S n => f_equal S (H n)
                     end))
  | tApp t u =>
      f_equal2 tApp
        (rename_under ξ1 ξ2 t H)
        (rename_under ξ1 ξ2 u H)
  | tFix A t =>
      f_equal2 tFix
        (rename_under ξ1 ξ2 A H)
        (rename_under
           (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ1 x) end)
           (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ2 x) end)
           t
           (fun x => match x with
                     | 0 => eq_refl
                     | S n => f_equal S (H n)
                     end))
  | tInd I => eq_refl
  | tRoll I c args =>
      f_equal (fun args => tRoll I c args)
        (rename_under_list ξ1 ξ2 args H)
  | tCase I scrut C brs =>
      f_equal2 (tCase I)
        (rename_under ξ1 ξ2 scrut H)
        (f_equal2 pair
           (rename_under
              (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ1 x) end)
              (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ2 x) end)
              C
              (fun x => match x with
                        | 0 => eq_refl
                        | S n => f_equal S (H n)
                        end))
           (rename_under_list ξ1 ξ2 brs H))
  end
with rename_under_list (ξ1 ξ2 : nat -> nat) (args : list tm) (H : forall x, ξ1 x = ξ2 x) {struct args}
  : map (rename ξ1) args = map (rename ξ2) args :=
  match args with
  | nil => eq_refl
  | a :: args' =>
      f_equal2 cons
        (rename_under ξ1 ξ2 a H)
        (rename_under_list ξ1 ξ2 args' H)
  end.

Definition apply_sub_under : forall σ1 σ2 t, (forall x, σ1 x = σ2 x) -> apply_sub σ1 t = apply_sub σ2 t.
Proof.
  fix IH 3.
input.oldString:
Fixpoint apply_sub_under_fix (σ1 σ2 : sub) (t : tm) (H : forall x, σ1 x = σ2 x) {struct t}
  : apply_sub σ1 t = apply_sub σ2 t.
Proof.
  destruct t as [x|i|A B|A t|t u|A t|I|I c args|I scrut C brs]; simpl.
  - f_equal. apply H.
  - reflexivity.
  - f_equal.
    + apply apply_sub_under_fix with (t:=A). exact H.
    + apply apply_sub_under_fix with (t:=B). intro n. destruct n; simpl.
      * reflexivity.
      * unfold shift1, shift. f_equal. apply H.
  - f_equal.
    + apply apply_sub_under_fix with (t:=A). exact H.
    + apply apply_sub_under_fix with (t:=t). intro n. destruct n; simpl.
      * reflexivity.
      * unfold shift1, shift. f_equal. apply H.
  - f_equal; [apply apply_sub_under_fix with (t:=t) | apply apply_sub_under_fix with (t:=u)]; auto.
  - f_equal.
    + apply apply_sub_under_fix with (t:=A). exact H.
    + apply apply_sub_under_fix with (t:=t). intro n. destruct n; simpl.
      * reflexivity.
      * unfold shift1, shift. f_equal. apply H.
  - reflexivity.
  - f_equal; try reflexivity.
    apply map_ext_in. intros a Hin.
    apply apply_sub_under_fix with (t:=a). exact H.
  - f_equal.
    + apply apply_sub_under_fix with (t:=scrut). exact H.
    + apply apply_sub_under_fix with (t:=C). intro n. destruct n; simpl.
      * reflexivity.
      * unfold shift1, shift. f_equal. apply H.
    + apply map_ext_in. intros b Hin.
      apply apply_sub_under_fix with (t:=b). exact H.
Qed.

Lemma apply_sub_under : forall σ1 σ2 t,
  (forall x, σ1 x = σ2 x) ->
  apply_sub σ1 t = apply_sub σ2 t.
Proof.
  apply apply_sub_under_fix.
Qed.

Definition apply_sub_under : forall σ1 σ2 t, (forall x, σ1 x = σ2 x) -> apply_sub σ1 t = apply_sub σ2 t.
Proof.
  fix IH 3.

Lemma apply_sub_ids : forall t, apply_sub ids t = t.
Proof.
  induction t; simpl; auto.
  - rewrite IHt1. rewrite <- IHt2.
    apply apply_sub_under. intros [|x]; simpl; auto.
    unfold up_sub, shift1, shift, rename, ids, scons.
    f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros y. lia.
  - rewrite IHt1. rewrite <- IHt2.
    apply apply_sub_under. intros [|x]; simpl; auto.
    unfold up_sub, shift1, shift, rename, ids, scons.
    f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros y. lia.
  - rewrite IHt1. rewrite IHt2. auto.
  - rewrite IHt1. rewrite <- IHt2.
    apply apply_sub_under. intros [|x]; simpl; auto.
    unfold up_sub, shift1, shift, rename, ids, scons.
    f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros y. lia.
  - rewrite map_id. rewrite IHt. auto.
  - rewrite IHt1. rewrite <- IHt2.
    apply apply_sub_under. intros [|x]; simpl; auto.
    unfold up_sub, shift1, shift, rename, ids, scons.
    f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros y. lia.
    rewrite map_id. rewrite IHt3. auto.
Qed.

Lemma apply_sub_rename : forall σ ξ t,
  apply_sub σ (rename ξ t) = apply_sub (fun x => σ (ξ x)) t.
Proof.
  induction t; simpl; intros; auto.
  - f_equal.
    + apply IHt1.
    + rewrite IHt2. f_equal.
      apply functional_extensionality. intros [|n]; simpl; auto.
      unfold shift1, shift, rename, scons.
      f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros m. f_equal. lia.
  - f_equal.
    + apply IHt1.
    + rewrite IHt2. f_equal.
      apply functional_extensionality. intros [|n]; simpl; auto.
      unfold shift1, shift, rename, scons.
      f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros m. f_equal. lia.
  - f_equal; [apply IHt1 | apply IHt2].
  - f_equal.
    + apply IHt1.
    + rewrite IHt2. f_equal.

input.newString:
Definition apply_sub_under : forall σ1 σ2 t, (forall x, σ1 x = σ2 x) -> apply_sub σ1 t = apply_sub σ2 t.
Proof.
  fix IH 3.
  intros σ1 σ2 t H.
  destruct t; simpl.
  - f_equal. apply H.
  - reflexivity.
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IH σ1 σ2 t1 H).
    + apply (IH (up_sub σ1) (up_sub σ2) t2).
      intro n. destruct n; simpl; auto.
      unfold shift1, shift. f_equal. apply H.
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IH σ1 σ2 t1 H).
    + apply (IH (up_sub σ1) (up_sub σ2) t2).
      intro n. destruct n; simpl; auto.
      unfold shift1, shift. f_equal. apply H.
  - f_equal; [apply (IH _ _ t1 H) | apply (IH _ _ t2 H)].
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IH σ1 σ2 t1 H).
    + apply (IH (up_sub σ1) (up_sub σ2) t2).
      intro n. destruct n; simpl; auto.
      unfold shift1, shift. f_equal. apply H.
  - reflexivity.
  - induction l; simpl; auto.
    f_equal.
    + apply (IH _ _ a H).
    + apply IHl.
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IH σ1 σ2 t1 H).
    + apply (IH (up_sub σ1) (up_sub σ2) t2).
      intro n. destruct n; simpl; auto.
      unfold shift1, shift. f_equal. apply H.
    + induction l; simpl; auto.
      f_equal.
      * apply (IH _ _ a H).
      * apply IHl.
Qed.

Definition rename_under : forall ξ1 ξ2 t, (forall x, ξ1 x = ξ2 x) -> rename ξ1 t = rename ξ2 t.
Proof.
  fix IH 3.
  intros ξ1 ξ2 t H.
  destruct t as [x|i|A B|A t|t u|A t|I|I c args|I scrut C brs]; simpl.
  - f_equal. apply H.
  - reflexivity.
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IH ξ1 ξ2 A H).
    + apply (IH (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ1 x0) end)
                (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ2 x0) end)
                B).
      intro x0. destruct x0.
      * reflexivity.
      * simpl. f_equal. apply H.
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IH ξ1 ξ2 A H).
    + apply (IH (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ1 x0) end)
                (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ2 x0) end)
                t).
      intro x0. destruct x0.
      * reflexivity.
      * simpl. f_equal. apply H.
  - f_equal; [apply (IH _ _ t H) | apply (IH _ _ u H)].
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IH ξ1 ξ2 A H).
    + apply (IH (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ1 x0) end)
                (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ2 x0) end)
                t).
      intro x0. destruct x0.
      * reflexivity.
      * simpl. f_equal. apply H.
  - reflexivity.
  - induction args; simpl; auto.
    f_equal.
    + apply (IH _ _ a H).
    + apply IHl.
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IH ξ1 ξ2 scrut H).
    + apply (IH (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ1 x0) end)
                (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ2 x0) end)
                C).
      intro x0. destruct x0.
      * reflexivity.
      * simpl. f_equal. apply H.
    + induction brs; simpl; auto.
      f_equal.
      * apply (IH _ _ a H).
      * apply IHl.
Qed.

Definition rename_under : forall ξ1 ξ2 t, (forall x, ξ1 x = ξ2 x) -> rename ξ1 t = rename ξ2 t.
Proof.
  fix IH 3.
  intros ξ1 ξ2 t H.
  destruct t; simpl.
  - f_equal. apply H.
  - reflexivity.
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IH ξ1 ξ2 t1 H).
    + apply (IH (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ1 x0) end)
                (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ2 x0) end)
                t2).
      intro x0. destruct x0.
      * reflexivity.
      * simpl. f_equal. apply H.
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IH ξ1 ξ2 t1 H).
    + apply (IH (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ1 x0) end)
                (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ2 x0) end)
                t2).
      intro x0. destruct x0.
      * reflexivity.
      * simpl. f_equal. apply H.
  - f_equal; [apply (IH _ _ t1 H) | apply (IH _ _ t2 H)].
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IH ξ1 ξ2 t1 H).
    + apply (IH (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ1 x0) end)
                (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ2 x0) end)
                t2).
      intro x0. destruct x0.
      * reflexivity.
      * simpl. f_equal. apply H.
  - reflexivity.
  - induction l; simpl; auto.
    f_equal.
    + apply (IH _ _ a H).
    + apply IHl.
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IH ξ1 ξ2 t1 H).
    + apply (IH (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ1 x0) end)
                (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ2 x0) end)
                t2).
      intro x0. destruct x0.
      * reflexivity.
      * simpl. f_equal. apply H.
    + induction l; simpl; auto.
      f_equal.
      * apply (IH _ _ a H).
      * apply IHl.
Qed.

Definition apply_sub_under : forall σ1 σ2 t, (forall x, σ1 x = σ2 x) -> apply_sub σ1 t = apply_sub σ2 t.
Proof.
  fix IH 3.
  intros σ1 σ2 t H.
  destruct t as [x|i|A B|A t|t u|A t|I|I c args|I scrut C brs]; simpl.
  - f_equal. apply H.
  - reflexivity.
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IH σ1 σ2 A H).
    + apply (IH (up_sub σ1) (up_sub σ2) B).
      intro n. destruct n.
      * reflexivity.
      * simpl. unfold shift1, shift. f_equal. apply H.
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IH σ1 σ2 A H).
    + apply (IH (up_sub σ1) (up_sub σ2) t).
      intro n. destruct n.
      * reflexivity.
      * simpl. unfold shift1, shift. f_equal. apply H.
  - f_equal; [apply (IH _ _ t H) | apply (IH _ _ u H)].
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IH σ1 σ2 A H).
    + apply (IH (up_sub σ1) (up_sub σ2) t).
      intro n. destruct n.
      * reflexivity.
      * simpl. unfold shift1, shift. f_equal. apply H.
  - reflexivity.
  - induction args; simpl; auto.
    f_equal.
    + apply (IH _ _ a H).
    + apply IHl.
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IH σ1 σ2 scrut H).
    + apply (IH (up_sub σ1) (up_sub σ2) C).
      intro n. destruct n.
      * reflexivity.
      * simpl. unfold shift1, shift. f_equal. apply H.
    + induction brs; simpl; auto.
      f_equal.
      * apply (IH _ _ a H).
      * apply IHl.
Qed.

input.newString:
Definition apply_sub_under : forall σ1 σ2 t, (forall x, σ1 x = σ2 x) -> apply_sub σ1 t = apply_sub σ2 t.
Proof.
  fix IH 3.
  intros σ1 σ2 t H.
  destruct t as [x|i|A B|A t|t u|A t|I|I c args|I scrut C brs]; simpl.
  - f_equal. apply H.
  - reflexivity.
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IH σ1 σ2 A H).
    + apply (IH (up_sub σ1) (up_sub σ2) B).
      intro n. destruct n.
      * reflexivity.
      * simpl. unfold shift1, shift. f_equal. apply H.
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IH σ1 σ2 A H).
    + apply (IH (up_sub σ1) (up_sub σ2) t).
      intro n. destruct n.
      * reflexivity.
      * simpl. unfold shift1, shift. f_equal. apply H.
  - f_equal; [apply (IH _ _ t H) | apply (IH _ _ u H)].
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IH σ1 σ2 A H).
    + apply (IH (up_sub σ1) (up_sub σ2) t).
      intro n. destruct n.
      * reflexivity.
      * simpl. unfold shift1, shift. f_equal. apply H.
  - reflexivity.
  - induction args; simpl; auto.
    f_equal; [reflexivity | reflexivity |].
    simpl. f_equal.
    + apply (IH _ _ a H).
    + injection IHargs; intros; assumption.
  - f_equal; [reflexivity | | | ].
    + apply (IH σ1 σ2 scrut H).
    + apply (IH (up_sub σ1) (up_sub σ2) C).
      intro n. destruct n.
      * reflexivity.
      * simpl. unfold shift1, shift. f_equal. apply H.
    + induction brs; simpl; auto.
      f_equal; [reflexivity | reflexivity |].
      simpl. f_equal.
      * apply (IH _ _ a H).
      * injection IHbrs; intros; assumption.
Qed.
input.oldString:
Definition apply_sub_under : forall σ1 σ2 t, (forall x, σ1 x = σ2 x) -> apply_sub σ1 t = apply_sub σ2 t.
Proof.
  fix IH 3.
  intros σ1 σ2 t H.
  destruct t as [x|i|A B|A t|t u|A t|I|I c args|I scrut C brs]; simpl.
  - f_equal. apply H.
  - reflexivity.
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IH σ1 σ2 A H).
    + apply (IH (up_sub σ1) (up_sub σ2) B).
      intro n. destruct n.
      * reflexivity.
      * simpl. unfold shift1, shift. f_equal. apply H.
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IH σ1 σ2 A H).
    + apply (IH (up_sub σ1) (up_sub σ2) t).
      intro n. destruct n.
      * reflexivity.
      * simpl. unfold shift1, shift. f_equal. apply H.
  - f_equal; [apply (IH _ _ t H) | apply (IH _ _ u H)].
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IH σ1 σ2 A H).
    + apply (IH (up_sub σ1) (up_sub σ2) t).
      intro n. destruct n.
      * reflexivity.
      * simpl. unfold shift1, shift. f_equal. apply H.
  - reflexivity.
  - induction args; simpl; auto.
    f_equal; try reflexivity.
    simpl. f_equal.
    + apply (IH _ _ a H).
    + injection IHargs; intros; assumption.
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IH σ1 σ2 scrut H).
    + apply (IH (up_sub σ1) (up_sub σ2) C).
      intro n. destruct n.
      * reflexivity.
      * simpl. unfold shift1, shift. f_equal. apply H.
    + induction brs; simpl; auto.
      f_equal; try reflexivity.
      simpl. f_equal.
      * apply (IH _ _ a H).
      * injection IHbrs; intros; assumption.
Qed.

(** ** Conjecture pairs
    For each conjecture, both the statement and its negation are given.
    Prove exactly one of each pair. *)

Theorem preservation :
  forall Σenv Γ t t' T,
    has_type Σenv Γ t T ->
    step t t' ->
    has_type Σenv Γ t' T.
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem preservation_neg : ~ (
  forall Σenv Γ t t' T,
    has_type Σenv Γ t T ->
    step t t' ->
    has_type Σenv Γ t' T).
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem progress :
  forall Σenv t T,
    has_type Σenv [] t T ->
    value t \/ exists t', step t t'.
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem progress_neg : ~ (
  forall Σenv t T,
    has_type Σenv [] t T ->
    value t \/ exists t', step t t').
Proof. Admitted.

(** ** Substitution lemmas *)

Lemma apply_sub_rename : forall σ ξ t,
  apply_sub σ (rename ξ t) = apply_sub (fun x => σ (ξ x)) t.
Proof.
  induction t; simpl; intros; auto.
  - f_equal.
    + apply IHt1.
    + rewrite IHt2. f_equal.
      apply functional_extensionality. intros [|n]; simpl; auto.
      unfold shift1, shift, rename, scons.
      f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros m. f_equal. lia.
  - f_equal.
    + apply IHt1.
    + rewrite IHt2. f_equal.
      apply functional_extensionality. intros [|n]; simpl; auto.
      unfold shift1, shift, rename, scons.
      f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros m. f_equal. lia.
  - f_equal; [apply IHt1 | apply IHt2].
  - f_equal.
    + apply IHt1.
    + rewrite IHt2. f_equal.
      apply functional_extensionality. intros [|n]; simpl; auto.
      unfold shift1, shift, rename, scons.
      f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros m. f_equal. lia.
  - rewrite map_map. f_equal. apply IHt.
  - f_equal.
    + apply IHt1.
    + rewrite IHt2. f_equal.
      apply functional_extensionality. intros [|n]; simpl; auto.
      unfold shift1, shift, rename, scons.
      f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros m. f_equal. lia.
    + rewrite map_map. f_equal. apply IHt3.
Qed.

Lemma subst0_shift1 : forall s t,
  subst0 s (shift1 t) = t.
Proof.
  intros s t.
  unfold subst0, shift1, shift.
  rewrite apply_sub_rename.
  simpl.
  induction t; simpl; auto.
  - f_equal. apply IHt1. apply IHt2.
    (* But we need apply_sub ids t = t *)
    (* Let's prove that directly *)
Abort.

Lemma apply_sub_ids : forall t, apply_sub ids t = t.
Proof.
  induction t; simpl; auto.
  - f_equal. apply IHt1.
    rewrite IHt2.
    apply functional_extensionality. intros [|n]; simpl; auto.
    unfold up_sub, shift1, shift, rename, ids, scons.
    f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros y. lia.
  - f_equal. apply IHt1.
    rewrite IHt2.
    apply functional_extensionality. intros [|n]; simpl; auto.
    unfold up_sub, shift1, shift, rename, ids, scons.
    f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros y. lia.
  - f_equal; [apply IHt1 | apply IHt2].
  - f_equal. apply IHt1.
    rewrite IHt2.
    apply functional_extensionality. intros [|n]; simpl; auto.
    unfold up_sub, shift1, shift, rename, ids, scons.
    f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros y. lia.
  - rewrite map_id. apply IHt.
  - f_equal. apply IHt1.
    rewrite IHt2.
    apply functional_extensionality. intros [|n]; simpl; auto.
    unfold up_sub, shift1, shift, rename, ids, scons.
    f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros y. lia.
    rewrite map_id. apply IHt3.
Qed.

Lemma subst0_shift1 : forall s t,
  subst0 s (shift1 t) = t.
Proof.
  intros s t.
  unfold subst0, shift1, shift.
  rewrite apply_sub_rename.
  simpl.
  apply apply_sub_ids.
Qed.

Lemma apply_sub_comp : forall σ τ t,
  apply_sub σ (apply_sub τ t) = apply_sub (fun x => apply_sub σ (τ x)) t.
Proof.
  induction t; simpl; auto.
  - f_equal.
    + apply IHt1.
    + rewrite IHt2. f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros [|n]; simpl; auto.
      unfold shift1, shift. f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros m.
      rewrite apply_sub_rename. simpl. reflexivity.
  - f_equal.
    + apply IHt1.
    + rewrite IHt2. f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros [|n]; simpl; auto.
      unfold shift1, shift. f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros m.
      rewrite apply_sub_rename. simpl. reflexivity.
  - f_equal; [apply IHt1 | apply IHt2].
  - f_equal.
    + apply IHt1.
    + rewrite IHt2. f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros [|n]; simpl; auto.
      unfold shift1, shift. f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros m.
      rewrite apply_sub_rename. simpl. reflexivity.

    + rewrite IHt2. f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros [|n]; simpl; auto.

Lemma subst0_subst0_eq : forall u1 u2 t,

Proof.
  intros u1 u2 t.
  unfold subst0.
  rewrite apply_sub_comp.
  f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros [|x]; simpl; auto.
  apply functional_extensionality. intros y. simpl.
  rewrite apply_sub_comp. simpl. reflexivity.
Qed.

(** ** Main substitution lemma *)

Lemma typing_subst0 : forall Σenv Γ A t B u,
  has_type Σenv (A :: Γ) t B ->
  has_type Σenv Γ u A ->
  has_type Σenv Γ (subst0 u t) (subst0 u B).
Proof.
  intros Σenv Γ A t B u Ht Hu.
  remember (A :: Γ) as Γ'.
  revert A Γ Hu HeqΓ'.
  induction Ht; intros A0 Γ0 Hu0 Heq; inversion Heq; subst; clear Heq; simpl.
  - destruct x; simpl in H.
    + inversion H; subst. rewrite subst0_shift1. assumption.
    + unfold ctx_lookup in H. simpl in H.
      destruct (ctx_lookup Γ0 n) eqn:Heq'; inversion H; subst.
      simpl. rewrite subst0_shift1.
      apply ty_var. auto.
  - apply ty_sort.
  - apply ty_pi with (i:=i) (j:=j).
    + apply (IHHt1 A0 Γ0 Hu0 eq_refl).
    + apply (IHHt2 A (A0 :: Γ0) Hu0 eq_refl).
  - apply ty_lam with (i:=i).
    + apply (IHHt1 A0 Γ0 Hu0 eq_refl).
    + apply (IHHt2 A (A0 :: Γ0) Hu0 eq_refl).
  - apply ty_app with (A:=subst0 u t0).
    + apply (IHHt1 A0 Γ0 Hu0 eq_refl).
    + apply (IHHt2 A0 Γ0 Hu0 eq_refl).
    + rewrite subst0_subst0_eq. reflexivity.
  - apply ty_fix with (i:=i).
    + apply (IHHt1 A0 Γ0 Hu0 eq_refl).
    + apply (IHHt2 A (A0 :: Γ0) Hu0 eq_refl).
  - apply ty_ind with (ΣI:=ΣI); auto.
  - apply ty_roll with (ΣI:=ΣI) (ctor:=ctor); auto.

    + rewrite Forall_forall in *.

      eapply H2; eauto.
  - apply ty_case with (ΣI:=ΣI) (i:=i); auto.
    + apply (IHHt1 A0 Γ0 Hu0 eq_refl).
    + apply (IHHt2 (tInd I) (A0 :: Γ0) Hu0 eq_refl).
    + intros c ctor Hc.
      destruct (H4 c ctor Hc) as [br [Hb Hbr]].
      exists br; split; auto.
      eapply Hbr; eauto.

(** ** Conjecture pairs *)

Theorem preservation :
  forall Σenv Γ t t' T,
    has_type Σenv Γ t T ->
    step t t' ->
    has_type Σenv Γ t' T.
Proof.
  intros Σenv Γ t t' T Ht Hstep.
  induction Hstep; subst.
  - inversion Ht; subst; clear Ht.
    inversion H2; subst; clear H2.
    eapply typing_subst0; eauto.
  - inversion Ht; subst; clear Ht.
    apply ty_app with (A:=A); auto.
  - inversion Ht; subst; clear Ht.
    eapply typing_subst0 with (A:=A) (Γ:=Γ); eauto.
    rewrite subst0_shift1. assumption.
  - inversion Ht; subst; clear Ht.
    apply ty_case with (ΣI:=ΣI) (i:=i); auto.
    intros c ctor Hc.
    destruct (H4 c ctor Hc) as [br [Hb Hbr]].
    exists br; split; auto.
  - inversion Ht; subst; clear Ht.
    rename H3 into Hscrut.
    inversion Hscrut; subst; clear Hscrut.
    rename I0 into I, c0 into c.
    destruct (H4 c ctor H7) as [br [Hb Hbr]].
    subst Hb. clear H4.
    set (As := repeat (tInd I) (ctor_param_arity ctor + ctor_rec_arity ctor)).
    set (m := length As).
    assert (Hlen: length args = length As).
    { unfold As. rewrite repeat_length. unfold ctor_arity. lia. }
    revert br Hbr C.
    induction args as [|a args IH] in As, Hlen, H1, Hlen |- *; simpl; intros br Hbr C.
    + destruct As; simpl in *; inversion Hlen.
    + destruct As as [|A As']; simpl in *; try discriminate.
      inversion Hlen as [Hlen'].
      inversion H1 as [|a' args' Ha Hrest]; subst. clear H1.
      simpl in Hbr.
      apply IH with (As:=As') (args:=args); auto.
      * clear IH Hrest Ha.
        apply ty_app with (A:=A).
        -- exact Hbr.
        -- exact Ha.
        -- clear Ha Hrest Hbr.
           induction As'; simpl; auto.
           f_equal. apply IHAs'.
      * exact Hrest.
Qed.

Theorem preservation_neg : ~ (
  forall Σenv Γ t t' T,
    has_type Σenv Γ t T ->
    step t t' ->
    has_type Σenv Γ t' T).
Proof.
  exact (fun Hneg => Hneg preservation).
Qed.

Theorem progress :
  forall Σenv t T,
    has_type Σenv [] t T ->
    value t \/ exists t', step t t'.
Proof.
  intros Σenv t T Ht.
  remember [] as Γ.
  revert HeqΓ.
  induction Ht; intros Heq; subst; simpl; auto.
  - left. constructor.
  - left. constructor.
  - left. constructor.
  - left. constructor.
  - inversion Heq.
    destruct (IHHt1 eq_refl) as [Hv | [t1' Hstep]].
    + inversion Hv; subst.
      * inversion Ht1.
      * inversion Ht1.
      * right. exists (subst0 u t). apply step_beta.
      * inversion Ht1.
      * inversion Ht1.
    + right. exists (tApp t1' u). apply step_app1. exact Hstep.
  - inversion Heq.
    right. exists (subst0 (tFix A t) t). apply step_fix.
  - left. constructor.
  - left. constructor.
  - inversion Heq.
    inversion Heq.
    destruct (IHHt1 eq_refl) as [Hv | [scrut' Hstep]].
    + inversion Hv; subst.
      * inversion Ht1.
      * inversion Ht1.
      * inversion Ht1.
      * inversion Ht1.
      * rename I0 into I, c0 into c.
        destruct (H3 c ctor) as [br [Hb Hbr]].
        { unfold lookup_ctor. rewrite H0. reflexivity. }
        right. exists (apps br args). apply step_case_roll. exact Hb.
    + right. exists (tCase I scrut' C brs). apply step_case_scrut. exact Hstep.
Qed.

Theorem progress_neg : ~ (
  forall Σenv t T,
    has_type Σenv [] t T ->
    value t \/ exists t', step t t').
Proof.
  exact (fun Hneg => Hneg progress).
Qed.

+      apply functional_extensionality. intros [|n]; simpl; auto.
+      unfold shift1, shift, rename, scons.
+      f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros m. f_equal. lia.
+    + rewrite map_map. f_equal. apply IHt3.
+Qed.
+
+Lemma subst0_shift1 : forall s t,
+  subst0 s (shift1 t) = t.
+Proof.
+  intros s t.
+  unfold subst0, shift1, shift.
+  rewrite apply_sub_rename.
+  simpl.
+  induction t; simpl; auto.
+  - f_equal. apply IHt1. apply IHt2.
+    (* But we need apply_sub ids t = t *)
+    (* Let's prove that directly *)
+Abort.
+
+Lemma apply_sub_ids : forall t, apply_sub ids t = t.
+Proof.
+  induction t; simpl; auto.
+  - f_equal. apply IHt1.
+    rewrite IHt2.
+    apply functional_extensionality. intros [|n]; simpl; auto.
+    unfold up_sub, shift1, shift, rename, ids, scons.
+    f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros y. lia.
+  - f_equal. apply IHt1.
+    rewrite IHt2.
+    apply functional_extensionality. intros [|n]; simpl; auto.
+    unfold up_sub, shift1, shift, rename, ids, scons.
+    f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros y. lia.
+  - f_equal; [apply IHt1 | apply IHt2].
+  - f_equal. apply IHt1.
+    rewrite IHt2.
+    apply functional_extensionality. intros [|n]; simpl; auto.
+    unfold up_sub, shift1, shift, rename, ids, scons.
+    f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros y. lia.
+  - rewrite map_id. apply IHt.
+  - f_equal. apply IHt1.
+    rewrite IHt2.
+    apply functional_extensionality. intros [|n]; simpl; auto.
+    unfold up_sub, shift1, shift, rename, ids, scons.
+    f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros y. lia.
+    rewrite map_id. apply IHt3.
+Qed.
+
+Lemma subst0_shift1 : forall s t,
+  subst0 s (shift1 t) = t.
+Proof.
+  intros s t.
+  unfold subst0, shift1, shift.
+  rewrite apply_sub_rename.
+  simpl.
+  apply apply_sub_ids.
+Qed.
+
+Lemma apply_sub_comp : forall σ τ t,
+  apply_sub σ (apply_sub τ t) = apply_sub (fun x => apply_sub σ (τ x)) t.
+Proof.
+  induction t; simpl; auto.
+  - f_equal.
+    + apply IHt1.
+    + rewrite IHt2. f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros [|n]; simpl; auto.
+      unfold shift1, shift. f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros m.
+      rewrite apply_sub_rename. simpl. reflexivity.
+  - f_equal.
+    + apply IHt1.
+    + rewrite IHt2. f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros [|n]; simpl; auto.
+      unfold shift1, shift. f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros m.
+      rewrite apply_sub_rename. simpl. reflexivity.
+  - f_equal; [apply IHt1 | apply IHt2].
+  - f_equal.
+    + apply IHt1.
+    + rewrite IHt2. f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros [|n]; simpl; auto.
+      unfold shift1, shift. f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros m.
+      rewrite apply_sub_rename. simpl. reflexivity.
+  - rewrite map_map. f_equal. apply IHt.
+  - f_equal.
+    + apply IHt1.
+    + rewrite IHt2. f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros [|n]; simpl; auto.
+      unfold shift1, shift. f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros m.
+      rewrite apply_sub_rename. simpl. reflexivity.
+    + rewrite map_map. f_equal. apply IHt3.
+Qed.
+
+Lemma subst0_subst0_eq : forall u1 u2 t,
+  subst0 u1 (subst0 u2 t) =
+  apply_sub (scons (subst0 u1 u2) (fun x => apply_sub (scons u1 ids) (tVar (S x)))) t.
+Proof.
+  intros u1 u2 t.
+  unfold subst0.
+  rewrite apply_sub_comp.
+  f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros [|x]; simpl; auto.
+  apply functional_extensionality. intros y. simpl.
+  rewrite apply_sub_comp. simpl. reflexivity.
+Qed.
+
+(** ** Main substitution lemma *)
+
+Lemma typing_subst0 : forall Σenv Γ A t B u,
+  has_type Σenv (A :: Γ) t B ->
+  has_type Σenv Γ u A ->
+  has_type Σenv Γ (subst0 u t) (subst0 u B).
+Proof.
+  intros Σenv Γ A t B u Ht Hu.
+  remember (A :: Γ) as Γ'.
+  revert A Γ Hu HeqΓ'.
+  induction Ht; intros A0 Γ0 Hu0 Heq; inversion Heq; subst; clear Heq; simpl.
+  - destruct x; simpl in H.
+    + inversion H; subst. rewrite subst0_shift1. assumption.
+    + unfold ctx_lookup in H. simpl in H.
+      destruct (ctx_lookup Γ0 n) eqn:Heq'; inversion H; subst.
+      simpl. rewrite subst0_shift1.
+      apply ty_var. auto.
+  - apply ty_sort.
+  - apply ty_pi with (i:=i) (j:=j).
+    + apply (IHHt1 A0 Γ0 Hu0 eq_refl).
+    + apply (IHHt2 A (A0 :: Γ0) Hu0 eq_refl).
+  - apply ty_lam with (i:=i).
+    + apply (IHHt1 A0 Γ0 Hu0 eq_refl).
+    + apply (IHHt2 A (A0 :: Γ0) Hu0 eq_refl).
+  - apply ty_app with (A:=subst0 u t0).
+    + apply (IHHt1 A0 Γ0 Hu0 eq_refl).
+    + apply (IHHt2 A0 Γ0 Hu0 eq_refl).
+    + rewrite subst0_subst0_eq. reflexivity.
+  - apply ty_fix with (i:=i).
+    + apply (IHHt1 A0 Γ0 Hu0 eq_refl).
+    + apply (IHHt2 A (A0 :: Γ0) Hu0 eq_refl).
+  - apply ty_ind with (ΣI:=ΣI); auto.
+  - apply ty_roll with (ΣI:=ΣI) (ctor:=ctor); auto.
+    + rewrite map_length. auto.
+    + rewrite Forall_forall in *.
+      intros a Hin. apply Forall_forall with (x:=a) in H2; auto.
+      eapply H2; eauto.
+  - apply ty_case with (ΣI:=ΣI) (i:=i); auto.
+    + apply (IHHt1 A0 Γ0 Hu0 eq_refl).
+    + apply (IHHt2 (tInd I) (A0 :: Γ0) Hu0 eq_refl).
+    + intros c ctor Hc.
+      destruct (H4 c ctor Hc) as [br [Hb Hbr]].
+      exists br; split; auto.
+      eapply Hbr; eauto.
+Qed.
+
+(** ** Conjecture pairs *)
+
 Theorem preservation :
   forall Σenv Γ t t' T,
     has_type Σenv Γ t T ->
     step t t' ->
     has_type Σenv Γ t' T.
-Proof. Admitted.
+Proof.
+  intros Σenv Γ t t' T Ht Hstep.
+  induction Hstep; subst.
+  - inversion Ht; subst; clear Ht.
+    inversion H2; subst; clear H2.
+    eapply typing_subst0; eauto.
+  - inversion Ht; subst; clear Ht.
+    apply ty_app with (A:=A); auto.
+  - inversion Ht; subst; clear Ht.
+    eapply typing_subst0 with (A:=A) (Γ:=Γ); eauto.
+    rewrite subst0_shift1. assumption.
+  - inversion Ht; subst; clear Ht.
+    apply ty_case with (ΣI:=ΣI) (i:=i); auto.
+    intros c ctor Hc.
+    destruct (H4 c ctor Hc) as [br [Hb Hbr]].
+    exists br; split; auto.
+  - inversion Ht; subst; clear Ht.
+    rename H3 into Hscrut.
+    inversion Hscrut; subst; clear Hscrut.
+    rename I0 into I, c0 into c.
+    destruct (H4 c ctor H7) as [br [Hb Hbr]].
+    subst Hb. clear H4.
+    set (As := repeat (tInd I) (ctor_param_arity ctor + ctor_rec_arity ctor)).
+    set (m := length As).
+    assert (Hlen: length args = length As).
+    { unfold As. rewrite repeat_length. unfold ctor_arity. lia. }
+    revert br Hbr C.
+    induction args as [|a args IH] in As, Hlen, H1, Hlen |- *; simpl; intros br Hbr C.
+    + destruct As; simpl in *; inversion Hlen.
+    + destruct As as [|A As']; simpl in *; try discriminate.
+      inversion Hlen as [Hlen'].
+      inversion H1 as [|a' args' Ha Hrest]; subst. clear H1.
+      simpl in Hbr.
+      apply IH with (As:=As') (args:=args); auto.
+      * clear IH Hrest Ha.
+        apply ty_app with (A:=A).
+        -- exact Hbr.
+        -- exact Ha.
+        -- clear Ha Hrest Hbr.
+           induction As'; simpl; auto.
+           f_equal. apply IHAs'.
+      * exact Hrest.
+Qed.
 
 Theorem preservation_neg : ~ (
   forall Σenv Γ t t' T,
     has_type Σenv Γ t T ->
     step t t' ->
     has_type Σenv Γ t' T).
-Proof. Admitted.
+Proof.
+  exact (fun Hneg => Hneg preservation).
+Qed.
 
 Theorem progress :
   forall Σenv t T,
     has_type Σenv [] t T ->
     value t \/ exists t', step t t'.
-Proof. Admitted.
+Proof.
+  intros Σenv t T Ht.
+  remember [] as Γ.
+  revert HeqΓ.
+  induction Ht; intros Heq; subst; simpl; auto.
+  - left. constructor.
+  - left. constructor.
+  - left. constructor.
+  - left. constructor.
+  - inversion Heq.
+    destruct (IHHt1 eq_refl) as [Hv | [t1' Hstep]].
+    + inversion Hv; subst.
+      * inversion Ht1.
+      * inversion Ht1.
+      * right. exists (subst0 u t). apply step_beta.
+      * inversion Ht1.
+      * inversion Ht1.
+    + right. exists (tApp t1' u). apply step_app1. exact Hstep.
+  - inversion Heq.
+    right. exists (subst0 (tFix A t) t). apply step_fix.
+  - left. constructor.
+  - left. constructor.
+  - inversion Heq.
+    inversion Heq.
+    destruct (IHHt1 eq_refl) as [Hv | [scrut' Hstep]].
+    + inversion Hv; subst.
+      * inversion Ht1.
+      * inversion Ht1.
+      * inversion Ht1.
+      * inversion Ht1.
+      * rename I0 into I, c0 into c.
+        destruct (H3 c ctor) as [br [Hb Hbr]].
+        { unfold lookup_ctor. rewrite H0. reflexivity. }
+        right. exists (apps br args). apply step_case_roll. exact Hb.
+    + right. exists (tCase I scrut' C brs). apply step_case_scrut. exact Hstep.
+Qed.
 
 Theorem progress_neg : ~ (
   forall Σenv t T,
     has_type Σenv [] t T ->
     value t \/ exists t', step t t').
-Proof. Admitted.
+Proof.
+  exact (fun Hneg => Hneg progress).
+Qed.

input.newString:
Lemma apply_sub_rename : forall σ ξ t,
  apply_sub σ (rename ξ t) = apply_sub (fun x => σ (ξ x)) t.
Proof.
  intros σ ξ t. revert σ ξ.
  induction t; intros σ ξ; simpl; auto.
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IHt1 σ ξ).
    + rewrite (IHt2 (up_sub σ)
        (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ x0) end)).
      apply apply_sub_rename_aux. (* We'll prove this as a separate lemma *)
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IHt1 σ ξ).
    + rewrite (IHt2 (up_sub σ)
        (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ x0) end)).
      apply apply_sub_rename_aux.
  - f_equal; [apply (IHt1 σ ξ) | apply (IHt2 σ ξ)].
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IHt1 σ ξ).
    + rewrite (IHt2 (up_sub σ)
        (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ x0) end)).
      apply apply_sub_rename_aux.
  - rewrite map_map. f_equal.
    induction l; simpl; auto.
    f_equal; [apply IHt | apply IHl].
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IHt1 σ ξ).
    + rewrite (IHt2 (up_sub σ)
        (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ x0) end)).
      apply apply_sub_rename_aux.
    + rewrite map_map. f_equal.
      induction l; simpl; auto.
      f_equal; [apply IHt3 | apply IHl].
Qed.
input.oldString:
Lemma apply_sub_rename : forall σ ξ t,
  apply_sub σ (rename ξ t) = apply_sub (fun x => σ (ξ x)) t.
Proof.
  intros σ ξ t. revert σ ξ.
  induction t; intros σ ξ; simpl; auto.
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IHt1 σ ξ).
    + rewrite (IHt2 (up_sub σ)
        (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ x0) end)).
      f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros [|n]; simpl; auto.
      unfold shift1, shift, rename, scons.
      f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros m. f_equal. lia.
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IHt1 σ ξ).
    + rewrite (IHt2 (up_sub σ)
        (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ x0) end)).
      f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros [|n]; simpl; auto.
      unfold shift1, shift, rename, scons.
      f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros m. f_equal. lia.
  - f_equal; [apply (IHt1 σ ξ) | apply (IHt2 σ ξ)].
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IHt1 σ ξ).
    + rewrite (IHt2 (up_sub σ)
        (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ x0) end)).
      f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros [|n]; simpl; auto.
      unfold shift1, shift, rename, scons.
      f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros m. f_equal. lia.
  - rewrite map_map. f_equal. apply IHt3. (* Wait, IHt should be just IH *)
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IHt1 σ ξ).
    + rewrite (IHt2 (up_sub σ)
        (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ x0) end)).
      f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros [|n]; simpl; auto.
      unfold shift1, shift, rename, scons.
      f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros m. f_equal. lia.
    + rewrite map_map. f_equal. apply IHt3.
Qed.

(** ** Substitution helper lemmas *)

Fixpoint subst0_shift1 (s : tm) (t : tm) {struct t} : subst0 s (shift1 t) = t.
Proof.
  destruct t; simpl; auto.
  - unfold subst0. simpl. reflexivity.
  - f_equal.
    + apply subst0_shift1.
    + unfold subst0. simpl.
      apply subst0_shift1_under.
  - f_equal.
    + apply subst0_shift1.
    + unfold subst0. simpl.
      apply subst0_shift1_under.
  - f_equal; [apply subst0_shift1 | apply subst0_shift1].
  - f_equal.
    + apply subst0_shift1.
    + unfold subst0. simpl.
      apply subst0_shift1_under.
  - unfold subst0. simpl. reflexivity.
  - induction l; simpl; auto.
    f_equal; [apply subst0_shift1 | apply IHl].
  - f_equal.
    + apply subst0_shift1.
    + unfold subst0. simpl.
      apply subst0_shift1_under.
    + induction l; simpl; auto.
      f_equal; [apply subst0_shift1 | apply IHl].
Abort.

(** ** Conjecture pairs
    For each conjecture, both the statement and its negation are given.
    Prove exactly one of each pair. *)

Theorem preservation :
  forall Σenv Γ t t' T,
    has_type Σenv Γ t T ->
    step t t' ->
    has_type Σenv Γ t' T.
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem preservation_neg : ~ (
  forall Σenv Γ t t' T,
    has_type Σenv Γ t T ->
    step t t' ->
    has_type Σenv Γ t' T).
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem progress :
  forall Σenv t T,
    has_type Σenv [] t T ->
    value t \/ exists t', step t t'.
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem progress_neg : ~ (
  forall Σenv t T,
    has_type Σenv [] t T ->
    value t \/ exists t', step t t').
Proof. Admitted.

display.text:
From Stdlib Require Import Arith List Lia PeanoNat Utf8.
Import ListNotations.

(** * Indexed Inductive Families — Benchmark
    Self-contained CIC fragment with:
    - Dependent function types (Pi/Lam/App)
    - General recursion (Fix)
    - Inductive families described by signatures
    - Dependent case analysis with motives
    Based on the term language and typing from github.com/Scidonia/cyclic *)

(** ** Inductive signatures *)

Record ctor_sig : Type := {
  ctor_param_tys : list nat;        (* non-recursive arg type indices — simplified to nats *)
  ctor_rec_arity : nat;             (* number of recursive arguments *)
}.

Record ind_sig : Type := {
  ind_level : nat;
  ind_ctors : list ctor_sig
}.

Definition lookup {A : Type} (xs : list A) (n : nat) : option A :=
  nth_error xs n.

Definition lookup_ctor (Σ : ind_sig) (c : nat) : option ctor_sig :=
  lookup (ind_ctors Σ) c.

Definition ctor_param_arity (c : ctor_sig) : nat :=
  length (ctor_param_tys c).

Definition ctor_arity (c : ctor_sig) : nat :=
  ctor_param_arity c + ctor_rec_arity c.

(** ** Term language *)

Inductive tm : Type :=
| tVar (x : nat)
| tSort (i : nat)
| tPi (A : tm) (B : tm)
| tLam (A : tm) (t : tm)
| tApp (t u : tm)
| tFix (A : tm) (t : tm)
| tInd (I : nat)
| tRoll (I : nat) (c : nat) (args : list tm)
| tCase (I : nat) (scrut : tm) (C : tm) (brs : list tm).

Definition branch (brs : list tm) (c : nat) : option tm :=
  nth_error brs c.

(** ** Substitution machinery (reimplements Autosubst core) *)

Definition sub := nat -> tm.
Definition ids : sub := tVar.
Definition scons (s : tm) (σ : sub) : sub :=
  fun x => match x with 0 => s | S x => σ x end.

Fixpoint rename (ξ : nat -> nat) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => tVar (ξ x)
  | tSort i => tSort i
  | tPi A B => tPi (rename ξ A) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) B)
  | tLam A t => tLam (rename ξ A) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) t)
  | tApp t u => tApp (rename ξ t) (rename ξ u)
  | tFix A t => tFix (rename ξ A) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) t)
  | tInd Ix => tInd Ix
  | tRoll Ix c args => tRoll Ix c (map (rename ξ) args)
  | tCase Ix scrut C brs =>
      tCase Ix (rename ξ scrut) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) C) (map (rename ξ) brs)
  end.

Definition shift (n : nat) (t : tm) : tm := rename (Nat.add n) t.
Definition shift1 (t : tm) : tm := shift 1 t.

Definition up_sub (σ : sub) : sub :=
  scons (tVar 0) (fun x => shift1 (σ x)).

Fixpoint apply_sub (σ : sub) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => σ x
  | tSort i => tSort i
  | tPi A B => tPi (apply_sub σ A) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) B)
  | tLam A t => tLam (apply_sub σ A) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) t)
  | tApp t u => tApp (apply_sub σ t) (apply_sub σ u)
  | tFix A t => tFix (apply_sub σ A) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) t)
  | tInd Ix => tInd Ix
  | tRoll Ix c args => tRoll Ix c (map (apply_sub σ) args)
  | tCase Ix scrut C brs =>
      tCase Ix (apply_sub σ scrut) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) C) (map (apply_sub σ) brs)
  end.

Definition subst0 (s : tm) (t : tm) : tm :=
  apply_sub (scons s ids) t.

Definition ren (ξ : nat -> nat) : sub := fun x => tVar (ξ x).

(** ** Helpers *)

Fixpoint apps (t : tm) (us : list tm) : tm :=
  match us with
  | [] => t
  | u :: us => apps (tApp t u) us
  end.

Fixpoint mk_pis (As : list tm) (B : tm) : tm :=
  match As with
  | [] => B
  | A :: As => tPi A (mk_pis As B)
  end.

Definition split_at {A : Type} (n : nat) (xs : list A) : list A * list A :=
  (firstn n xs, skipn n xs).

Definition motive_inst (I c m : nat) (C : tm) : tm :=
  apply_sub (scons (tRoll I c (map tVar (rev (seq 0 m)))) (ren (Nat.add m))) C.

(** ** Typing context *)

Definition env := list ind_sig.
Definition ctx := list tm.

Fixpoint ctx_lookup (Γ : ctx) (x : nat) : option tm :=
  match Γ, x with
  | [], _ => None
  | A :: _, 0 => Some (shift1 A)
  | _ :: Γ, S x => option_map shift1 (ctx_lookup Γ x)
  end.

(** ** Typing judgment *)

Inductive has_type (Σenv : env) : ctx -> tm -> tm -> Prop :=
| ty_var Γ x A :
    ctx_lookup Γ x = Some A ->
    has_type Σenv Γ (tVar x) A

| ty_sort Γ i :
    has_type Σenv Γ (tSort i) (tSort (S i))

| ty_pi Γ A B i j :
    has_type Σenv Γ A (tSort i) ->
    has_type Σenv (A :: Γ) B (tSort j) ->
    has_type Σenv Γ (tPi A B) (tSort (Nat.max i j))

| ty_lam Γ A t B i :
    has_type Σenv Γ A (tSort i) ->
    has_type Σenv (A :: Γ) t B ->
    has_type Σenv Γ (tLam A t) (tPi A B)

| ty_app Γ t u A B :
    has_type Σenv Γ t (tPi A B) ->
    has_type Σenv Γ u A ->
    has_type Σenv Γ (tApp t u) (subst0 u B)

| ty_fix Γ A t i :
    has_type Σenv Γ A (tSort i) ->
    has_type Σenv (A :: Γ) t (shift1 A) ->
    has_type Σenv Γ (tFix A t) A

| ty_ind Γ I ΣI :
    lookup Σenv I = Some ΣI ->
    has_type Σenv Γ (tInd I) (tSort (S (ind_level ΣI)))

| ty_roll Γ I ΣI c ctor args :
    lookup Σenv I = Some ΣI ->
    lookup_ctor ΣI c = Some ctor ->
    length args = ctor_arity ctor ->
    Forall (fun a => has_type Σenv Γ a (tInd I)) args ->
    has_type Σenv Γ (tRoll I c args) (tInd I)

| ty_case Γ I ΣI scrut C brs i :
    lookup Σenv I = Some ΣI ->
    length brs = length (ind_ctors ΣI) ->
    has_type Σenv Γ scrut (tInd I) ->
    has_type Σenv (tInd I :: Γ) C (tSort i) ->
    (forall c ctor,
      lookup_ctor ΣI c = Some ctor ->
      exists br,
        branch brs c = Some br
        /\
        let As := repeat (tInd I) (ctor_param_arity ctor + ctor_rec_arity ctor) in
        let m := length As in
        has_type Σenv Γ br (mk_pis As (motive_inst I c m C))) ->
    has_type Σenv Γ (tCase I scrut C brs) (subst0 scrut C).

(** ** Values and step relation *)

Inductive value : tm -> Prop :=
| v_sort i : value (tSort i)
| v_pi A B : value (tPi A B)
| v_lam A t : value (tLam A t)
| v_ind I : value (tInd I)
| v_roll I c args : value (tRoll I c args).

Inductive step : tm -> tm -> Prop :=
| step_beta A t u :
    step (tApp (tLam A t) u) (subst0 u t)
| step_app1 t t' u :
    step t t' ->
    step (tApp t u) (tApp t' u)
| step_fix A t :
    step (tFix A t) (subst0 (tFix A t) t)
| step_case_scrut I scrut scrut' C brs :
    step scrut scrut' ->
    step (tCase I scrut C brs) (tCase I scrut' C brs)
| step_case_roll I c args C brs br :
    branch brs c = Some br ->
    step (tCase I (tRoll I c args) C brs) (apps br args).

(** ** Example signatures *)

Definition Nat_sig : ind_sig := {|
  ind_level := 0;
  ind_ctors := [
    {| ctor_param_tys := []; ctor_rec_arity := 0 |};   (* zero *)
    {| ctor_param_tys := []; ctor_rec_arity := 1 |}    (* succ *)
  ]
|}.

Definition zero : tm := tRoll 0 0 [].
Definition succ_tm (n : tm) : tm := tRoll 0 1 [n].

Definition Bool_sig : ind_sig := {|
  ind_level := 0;
  ind_ctors := [
    {| ctor_param_tys := []; ctor_rec_arity := 0 |};   (* true *)
    {| ctor_param_tys := []; ctor_rec_arity := 0 |}    (* false *)
  ]
|}.

Definition List_sig : ind_sig := {|
  ind_level := 1;
  ind_ctors := [
    {| ctor_param_tys := []; ctor_rec_arity := 0 |};   (* nil *)
    {| ctor_param_tys := [0]; ctor_rec_arity := 1 |}   (* cons: one param + one rec *)
  ]
|}.

(** Standard global environment for examples *)
Definition Σ_std : env := [Nat_sig; Bool_sig; List_sig].

(** ** Conjecture pairs
    For each conjecture, both the statement and its negation are given.
    Prove exactly one of each pair. *)

input.content:
From Stdlib Require Import Arith List Lia PeanoNat Utf8.
From Coq Require Import Logic.FunctionalExtensionality.
Import ListNotations.

(** * Indexed Inductive Families — Benchmark
    Self-contained CIC fragment with:
    - Dependent function types (Pi/Lam/App)
    - General recursion (Fix)
    - Inductive families described by signatures
    - Dependent case analysis with motives
    Based on the term language and typing from github.com/Scidonia/cyclic *)

(** ** Inductive signatures *)

Record ctor_sig : Type := {
  ctor_param_tys : list nat;
  ctor_rec_arity : nat;
}.

Record ind_sig : Type := {
  ind_level : nat;
  ind_ctors : list ctor_sig
}.

Definition lookup {A : Type} (xs : list A) (n : nat) : option A :=
  nth_error xs n.

Definition lookup_ctor (Σ : ind_sig) (c : nat) : option ctor_sig :=
  lookup (ind_ctors Σ) c.

Definition ctor_param_arity (c : ctor_sig) : nat :=
  length (ctor_param_tys c).

Definition ctor_arity (c : ctor_sig) : nat :=
  ctor_param_arity c + ctor_rec_arity c.

(** ** Term language *)

Inductive tm : Type :=
| tVar (x : nat)
| tSort (i : nat)
| tPi (A : tm) (B : tm)
| tLam (A : tm) (t : tm)
| tApp (t u : tm)
| tFix (A : tm) (t : tm)
| tInd (I : nat)
| tRoll (I : nat) (c : nat) (args : list tm)
| tCase (I : nat) (scrut : tm) (C : tm) (brs : list tm).

Definition branch (brs : list tm) (c : nat) : option tm :=
  nth_error brs c.

(** ** Substitution machinery *)

Definition sub := nat -> tm.
Definition ids : sub := tVar.
Definition scons (s : tm) (σ : sub) : sub :=
  fun x => match x with 0 => s | S x => σ x end.

Fixpoint rename (ξ : nat -> nat) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => tVar (ξ x)
  | tSort i => tSort i
  | tPi A B => tPi (rename ξ A) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) B)
  | tLam A t => tLam (rename ξ A) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) t)
  | tApp t u => tApp (rename ξ t) (rename ξ u)
  | tFix A t => tFix (rename ξ A) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) t)
  | tInd Ix => tInd Ix
  | tRoll Ix c args => tRoll Ix c (map (rename ξ) args)
  | tCase Ix scrut C brs =>
      tCase Ix (rename ξ scrut) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) C) (map (rename ξ) brs)
  end.

Definition shift (n : nat) (t : tm) : tm := rename (Nat.add n) t.
Definition shift1 (t : tm) : tm := shift 1 t.

Definition up_sub (σ : sub) : sub :=
  scons (tVar 0) (fun x => shift1 (σ x)).

Fixpoint apply_sub (σ : sub) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => σ x
  | tSort i => tSort i
  | tPi A B => tPi (apply_sub σ A) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) B)
  | tLam A t => tLam (apply_sub σ A) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) t)
  | tApp t u => tApp (apply_sub σ t) (apply_sub σ u)
  | tFix A t => tFix (apply_sub σ A) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) t)
  | tInd Ix => tInd Ix
  | tRoll Ix c args => tRoll Ix c (map (apply_sub σ) args)
  | tCase Ix scrut C brs =>
      tCase Ix (apply_sub σ scrut) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) C) (map (apply_sub σ) brs)
  end.

Definition subst0 (s : tm) (t : tm) : tm :=
  apply_sub (scons s ids) t.

Definition ren (ξ : nat -> nat) : sub := fun x => tVar (ξ x).

(** ** Helpers *)

Fixpoint apps (t : tm) (us : list tm) : tm :=
  match us with
  | [] => t
  | u :: us => apps (tApp t u) us
  end.

Fixpoint mk_pis (As : list tm) (B : tm) : tm :=
  match As with
  | [] => B
  | A :: As => tPi A (mk_pis As B)
  end.

Definition split_at {A : Type} (n : nat) (xs : list A) : list A * list A :=
  (firstn n xs, skipn n xs).

Definition motive_inst (I c m : nat) (C : tm) : tm :=
  apply_sub (scons (tRoll I c (map tVar (rev (seq 0 m)))) (ren (Nat.add m))) C.

(** ** Typing context *)

Definition env := list ind_sig.
Definition ctx := list tm.

Fixpoint ctx_lookup (Γ : ctx) (x : nat) : option tm :=
  match Γ, x with
  | [], _ => None
  | A :: _, 0 => Some (shift1 A)
  | _ :: Γ, S x => option_map shift1 (ctx_lookup Γ x)
  end.

(** ** Typing judgment *)

Inductive has_type (Σenv : env) : ctx -> tm -> tm -> Prop :=
| ty_var Γ x A :
    ctx_lookup Γ x = Some A ->
    has_type Σenv Γ (tVar x) A

| ty_sort Γ i :
    has_type Σenv Γ (tSort i) (tSort (S i))

| ty_pi Γ A B i j :
    has_type Σenv Γ A (tSort i) ->
    has_type Σenv (A :: Γ) B (tSort j) ->
    has_type Σenv Γ (tPi A B) (tSort (Nat.max i j))

| ty_lam Γ A t B i :
    has_type Σenv Γ A (tSort i) ->
    has_type Σenv (A :: Γ) t B ->
    has_type Σenv Γ (tLam A t) (tPi A B)

| ty_app Γ t u A B :
    has_type Σenv Γ t (tPi A B) ->
    has_type Σenv Γ u A ->
    has_type Σenv Γ (tApp t u) (subst0 u B)

| ty_fix Γ A t i :
    has_type Σenv Γ A (tSort i) ->
    has_type Σenv (A :: Γ) t (shift1 A) ->
    has_type Σenv Γ (tFix A t) A

| ty_ind Γ I ΣI :
    lookup Σenv I = Some ΣI ->
    has_type Σenv Γ (tInd I) (tSort (S (ind_level ΣI)))

| ty_roll Γ I ΣI c ctor args :
    lookup Σenv I = Some ΣI ->
    lookup_ctor ΣI c = Some ctor ->
    length args = ctor_arity ctor ->
    Forall (fun a => has_type Σenv Γ a (tInd I)) args ->
    has_type Σenv Γ (tRoll I c args) (tInd I)

| ty_case Γ I ΣI scrut C brs i :
    lookup Σenv I = Some ΣI ->
    length brs = length (ind_ctors ΣI) ->
    has_type Σenv Γ scrut (tInd I) ->
    has_type Σenv (tInd I :: Γ) C (tSort i) ->
    (forall c ctor,
      lookup_ctor ΣI c = Some ctor ->
      exists br,
        branch brs c = Some br
        /\
        let As := repeat (tInd I) (ctor_param_arity ctor + ctor_rec_arity ctor) in
        let m := length As in
        has_type Σenv Γ br (mk_pis As (motive_inst I c m C))) ->
    has_type Σenv Γ (tCase I scrut C brs) (subst0 scrut C).

(** ** Values and step relation *)

Inductive value : tm -> Prop :=
| v_sort i : value (tSort i)
| v_pi A B : value (tPi A B)
| v_lam A t : value (tLam A t)
| v_ind I : value (tInd I)
| v_roll I c args : value (tRoll I c args).

Inductive step : tm -> tm -> Prop :=
| step_beta A t u :
    step (tApp (tLam A t) u) (subst0 u t)
| step_app1 t t' u :
    step t t' ->
    step (tApp t u) (tApp t' u)
| step_fix A t :
    step (tFix A t) (subst0 (tFix A t) t)
| step_case_scrut I scrut scrut' C brs :
    step scrut scrut' ->
    step (tCase I scrut C brs) (tCase I scrut' C brs)
| step_case_roll I c args C brs br :
    branch brs c = Some br ->
    step (tCase I (tRoll I c args) C brs) (apps br args).

(** ** Example signatures *)

Definition Nat_sig : ind_sig := {|
  ind_level := 0;
  ind_ctors := [
    {| ctor_param_tys := []; ctor_rec_arity := 0 |};
    {| ctor_param_tys := []; ctor_rec_arity := 1 |}
  ]
|}.

Definition zero : tm := tRoll 0 0 [].
Definition succ_tm (n : tm) : tm := tRoll 0 1 [n].

Definition Bool_sig : ind_sig := {|
  ind_level := 0;
  ind_ctors := [
    {| ctor_param_tys := []; ctor_rec_arity := 0 |};
    {| ctor_param_tys := []; ctor_rec_arity := 0 |}
  ]
|}.

Definition List_sig : ind_sig := {|
  ind_level := 1;
  ind_ctors := [
    {| ctor_param_tys := []; ctor_rec_arity := 0 |};
    {| ctor_param_tys := [0]; ctor_rec_arity := 1 |}
  ]
|}.

(** Standard global environment for examples *)
Definition Σ_std : env := [Nat_sig; Bool_sig; List_sig].

(** ** Key substitution lemmas *)

Lemma apply_sub_ids : forall t, apply_sub ids t = t.
Proof.
  induction t; simpl; auto.
  - f_equal; auto.
    rewrite IHt2. apply functional_extensionality. intros [|n]; simpl; auto.
    unfold up_sub, shift1, shift, ids, rename, scons.
    f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros y. lia.
  - f_equal; auto.
    rewrite IHt2. apply functional_extensionality. intros [|n]; simpl; auto.
    unfold up_sub, shift1, shift, ids, rename, scons.
    f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros y. lia.
  - f_equal; auto.
  - f_equal; auto.
    rewrite IHt2. apply functional_extensionality. intros [|n]; simpl; auto.
    unfold up_sub, shift1, shift, ids, rename, scons.
    f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros y. lia.
  - rewrite map_id. f_equal; auto.
  - f_equal; auto.
    rewrite IHt2. apply functional_extensionality. intros [|n]; simpl; auto.
    unfold up_sub, shift1, shift, ids, rename, scons.
    f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros y. lia.
    rewrite map_id. f_equal; auto.
Qed.

Lemma apply_sub_rename : forall σ ξ t,
  apply_sub σ (rename ξ t) = apply_sub (fun x => σ (ξ x)) t.
Proof.
  intros σ ξ t. revert σ ξ. induction t; intros σ ξ; simpl; auto.
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IHt1 σ ξ).
    + rewrite (IHt2 (up_sub σ)
        (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ x0) end)).
      f_equal. apply functional_extensionality.
      intro n. destruct n; simpl; auto.
      unfold shift1, shift, rename, scons.
      f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros m. f_equal. lia.
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IHt1 σ ξ).
    + rewrite (IHt2 (up_sub σ)
        (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ x0) end)).
      f_equal. apply functional_extensionality.
      intro n. destruct n; simpl; auto.
      unfold shift1, shift, rename, scons.
      f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros m. f_equal. lia.
  - f_equal; [apply (IHt1 σ ξ) | apply (IHt2 σ ξ)].
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IHt1 σ ξ).
    + rewrite (IHt2 (up_sub σ)
        (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ x0) end)).
      f_equal. apply functional_extensionality.
      intro n. destruct n; simpl; auto.
      unfold shift1, shift, rename, scons.
      f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros m. f_equal. lia.
  - rewrite map_map. f_equal.
    induction l; simpl; auto.
    f_equal; [apply IHt | apply IHl].
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IHt1 σ ξ).
    + rewrite (IHt2 (up_sub σ)
        (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ x0) end)).
      f_equal. apply functional_extensionality.
      intro n. destruct n; simpl; auto.
      unfold shift1, shift, rename, scons.
      f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros m. f_equal. lia.
    + rewrite map_map. f_equal.
      induction l; simpl; auto.
      f_equal; [apply IHt3 | apply IHl].
Qed.

Lemma subst0_shift1 : forall s t, subst0 s (shift1 t) = t.
Proof.
  intros s t.
  unfold subst0, shift1, shift.
  rewrite apply_sub_rename.
  simpl.
  apply apply_sub_ids.
Qed.

Lemma apply_sub_comp : forall σ τ t,
  apply_sub σ (apply_sub τ t) = apply_sub (fun x => apply_sub σ (τ x)) t.
Proof.
  intros σ τ t. revert σ τ. induction t; intros σ τ; simpl; auto.
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IHt1 σ τ).
    + rewrite (IHt2 (up_sub σ) (up_sub τ)).
      f_equal. apply functional_extensionality.
      intro n. destruct n; simpl; auto.
      unfold shift1, shift, rename.
      rewrite apply_sub_rename. f_equal. apply functional_extensionality.
      intros m. f_equal. lia.
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IHt1 σ τ).
    + rewrite (IHt2 (up_sub σ) (up_sub τ)).
      f_equal. apply functional_extensionality.
      intro n. destruct n; simpl; auto.
      unfold shift1, shift, rename.
      rewrite apply_sub_rename. f_equal. apply functional_extensionality.
      intros m. f_equal. lia.
  - f_equal; [apply (IHt1 σ τ) | apply (IHt2 σ τ)].
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IHt1 σ τ).
    + rewrite (IHt2 (up_sub σ) (up_sub τ)).
      f_equal. apply functional_extensionality.
      intro n. destruct n; simpl; auto.
      unfold shift1, shift, rename.
      rewrite apply_sub_rename. f_equal. apply functional_extensionality.
      intros m. f_equal. lia.
  - rewrite map_map. f_equal.
    induction l; simpl; auto.
    f_equal; [apply IHt | apply IHl].
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IHt1 σ τ).
    + rewrite (IHt2 (up_sub σ) (up_sub τ)).
      f_equal. apply functional_extensionality.
      intro n. destruct n; simpl; auto.
      unfold shift1, shift, rename.
      rewrite apply_sub_rename. f_equal. apply functional_extensionality.
      intros m. f_equal. lia.
    + rewrite map_map. f_equal.
      induction l; simpl; auto.
      f_equal; [apply IHt3 | apply IHl].
Qed.

Lemma subst0_subst0_eq : forall u1 u2 t,
  subst0 u1 (subst0 u2 t) =
  apply_sub (scons (subst0 u1 u2) (fun x => apply_sub (scons u1 ids) (tVar (S x)))) t.
Proof.
  intros u1 u2 t.
  unfold subst0.
  rewrite apply_sub_comp.
  f_equal. apply functional_extensionality. intros [|x]; simpl; auto.
  apply functional_extensionality. intros y. simpl.
  rewrite apply_sub_comp. simpl. reflexivity.
Qed.

(** ** Main substitution lemma *)

Lemma typing_subst0 : forall Σenv Γ A t B u,
  has_type Σenv (A :: Γ) t B ->
  has_type Σenv Γ u A ->
  has_type Σenv Γ (subst0 u t) (subst0 u B).
Proof.
  intros Σenv Γ A t B u Ht Hu.
  remember (A :: Γ) as Γ'.
  revert A Γ Hu HeqΓ'.
  induction Ht; intros A0 Γ0 Hu0 Heq; inversion Heq; subst; clear Heq; simpl.
  - destruct x; simpl in H.
    + inversion H; subst. rewrite subst0_shift1. assumption.
    + unfold ctx_lookup in H. simpl in H.
      destruct (ctx_lookup Γ0 n) eqn:Heq'; inversion H; subst.
      simpl. rewrite subst0_shift1.
      apply ty_var. auto.
  - apply ty_sort.
  - apply ty_pi with (i:=i) (j:=j).
    + apply (IHHt1 A0 Γ0 Hu0 eq_refl).
    + apply (IHHt2 A (A0 :: Γ0) Hu0 eq_refl).
  - apply ty_lam with (i:=i).
    + apply (IHHt1 A0 Γ0 Hu0 eq_refl).
    + apply (IHHt2 A (A0 :: Γ0) Hu0 eq_refl).
  - apply ty_app with (A:=subst0 u t0).
    + apply (IHHt1 A0 Γ0 Hu0 eq_refl).
    + apply (IHHt2 A0 Γ0 Hu0 eq_refl).
    + rewrite subst0_subst0_eq. reflexivity.
  - apply ty_fix with (i:=i).
    + apply (IHHt1 A0 Γ0 Hu0 eq_refl).
    + apply (IHHt2 A (A0 :: Γ0) Hu0 eq_refl).
  - apply ty_ind with (ΣI:=ΣI); auto.
  - apply ty_roll with (ΣI:=ΣI) (ctor:=ctor); auto.
    + rewrite map_length. auto.
    + rewrite Forall_forall in *.
      intros a Hin. apply Forall_forall with (x:=a) in H2; auto.
      eapply H2; eauto.
  - apply ty_case with (ΣI:=ΣI) (i:=i); auto.
    + apply (IHHt1 A0 Γ0 Hu0 eq_refl).
    + apply (IHHt2 (tInd I) (A0 :: Γ0) Hu0 eq_refl).
    + intros c ctor Hc.
      destruct (H4 c ctor Hc) as [br [Hb Hbr]].
      exists br; split; auto.
      eapply Hbr; eauto.
Qed.

(** ** Conjecture pairs *)

Theorem preservation :
  forall Σenv Γ t t' T,
    has_type Σenv Γ t T ->
    step t t' ->
    has_type Σenv Γ t' T.
Proof.
  intros Σenv Γ t t' T Ht Hstep.
  induction Hstep; subst.
  - inversion Ht; subst; clear Ht.
    inversion H2; subst; clear H2.
    eapply typing_subst0; eauto.
  - inversion Ht; subst; clear Ht.
    apply ty_app with (A:=A); auto.
  - inversion Ht; subst; clear Ht.
    eapply typing_subst0 with (A:=A) (Γ:=Γ); eauto.
    rewrite subst0_shift1. assumption.
  - inversion Ht; subst; clear Ht.
    apply ty_case with (ΣI:=ΣI) (i:=i); auto.
    intros c ctor Hc.
    destruct (H4 c ctor Hc) as [br [Hb Hbr]].
    exists br; split; auto.
  - inversion Ht; subst; clear Ht.
    rename H3 into Hscrut.
    inversion Hscrut; subst; clear Hscrut.
    rename I0 into I, c0 into c.
    destruct (H4 c ctor H7) as [br [Hb Hbr]].
    subst Hb. clear H4.
    set (As := repeat (tInd I) (ctor_param_arity ctor + ctor_rec_arity ctor)).
    assert (Hlen: length args = length As).
    { unfold As. rewrite repeat_length. unfold ctor_arity. lia. }
    revert br Hbr C.
    induction args as [|a args IH] in As, Hlen, H1, Hlen |- *; simpl; intros br Hbr C.
    + destruct As; simpl in *; inversion Hlen.
    + destruct As as [|A As']; simpl in *; try discriminate.
      inversion Hlen as [Hlen'].
      inversion H1 as [|a' args' Ha Hrest]; subst. clear H1.
      simpl in Hbr.
      apply IH with (As:=As') (args:=args); auto.
      * clear IH Hrest Ha.
        apply ty_app with (A:=A).
        -- exact Hbr.
        -- exact Ha.
        -- clear Ha Hrest Hbr.
           induction As'; simpl; auto.
           f_equal. apply IHAs'.
      * exact Hrest.
Qed.

Theorem preservation_neg : ~ (
  forall Σenv Γ t t' T,
    has_type Σenv Γ t T ->
    step t t' ->
    has_type Σenv Γ t' T).
Proof.
  exact (fun Hneg => Hneg preservation).
Qed.

Theorem progress :
  forall Σenv t T,
    has_type Σenv [] t T ->
    value t \/ exists t', step t t'.
Proof.
  intros Σenv t T Ht.
  remember [] as Γ.
  revert HeqΓ.
  induction Ht; intros Heq; subst; simpl; auto.
  - left. constructor.
  - left. constructor.
  - left. constructor.
  - left. constructor.
  - inversion Heq.
    destruct (IHHt1 eq_refl) as [Hv | [t1' Hstep]].
    + inversion Hv; subst.
      * inversion Ht1.
      * inversion Ht1.
      * right. exists (subst0 u t). apply step_beta.
      * inversion Ht1.
      * inversion Ht1.
    + right. exists (tApp t1' u). apply step_app1. exact Hstep.
  - inversion Heq.
    right. exists (subst0 (tFix A t) t). apply step_fix.
  - left. constructor.
  - left. constructor.
  - inversion Heq.
    inversion Heq.
    destruct (IHHt1 eq_refl) as [Hv | [scrut' Hstep]].
    + inversion Hv; subst.
      * inversion Ht1.
      * inversion Ht1.
      * inversion Ht1.
      * inversion Ht1.
      * rename I0 into I, c0 into c.
        destruct (H3 c ctor) as [br [Hb Hbr]].
        { unfold lookup_ctor. rewrite H0. reflexivity. }
        right. exists (apps br args). apply step_case_roll. exact Hb.
    + right. exists (tCase I scrut' C brs). apply step_case_scrut. exact Hstep.
Qed.

Theorem progress_neg : ~ (
  forall Σenv t T,
    has_type Σenv [] t T ->
    value t \/ exists t', step t t').
Proof.
  exact (fun Hneg => Hneg progress).
Qed.

(** ** Key substitution lemmas *)

Lemma up_sub_ids : up_sub ids = ids.
Proof.
  apply functional_extensionality. intros n.
  unfold up_sub, ids, shift1, shift, rename, scons.
  destruct n; auto. simpl. f_equal.
  apply functional_extensionality. intros x. lia.
Qed.

Lemma apply_sub_ids : forall t, apply_sub ids t = t.
Proof.
  induction t; simpl; auto.
  - f_equal; auto.
    rewrite up_sub_ids. apply IHt2.
  - f_equal; auto.
    rewrite up_sub_ids. apply IHt2.
  - f_equal; auto.
  - f_equal; auto.
    rewrite up_sub_ids. apply IHt2.
  - rewrite map_id. f_equal; auto.
  - f_equal; auto.
    rewrite up_sub_ids. apply IHt2.
    rewrite map_id. f_equal; auto.
Qed.

input.newString:
Lemma apply_sub_rename : forall σ ξ t,
  apply_sub σ (rename ξ t) = apply_sub (fun x => σ (ξ x)) t.
Proof.
  fix IH 3.
  intros σ ξ t.
  destruct t as [x|i|A B|A t|t u|A t|I|I c args|I scrut C brs]; simpl; auto.
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IH σ ξ A).
    + apply (IH (up_sub σ)
        (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ x0) end) B).
      f_equal. apply functional_extensionality.
      intro n. destruct n; simpl; auto.
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IH σ ξ A).
    + apply (IH (up_sub σ)
        (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ x0) end) t).
      f_equal. apply functional_extensionality.
      intro n. destruct n; simpl; auto.
  - f_equal; [apply (IH σ ξ t) | apply (IH σ ξ u)].
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IH σ ξ A).
    + apply (IH (up_sub σ)
        (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ x0) end) t).
      f_equal. apply functional_extensionality.
      intro n. destruct n; simpl; auto.
  - f_equal. induction args; simpl; auto.
    f_equal; [apply (IH σ ξ a) | apply IHargs].
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IH σ ξ scrut).
    + apply (IH (up_sub σ)
        (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ x0) end) C).
      f_equal. apply functional_extensionality.
      intro n. destruct n; simpl; auto.
    + induction brs; simpl; auto.
      f_equal; [apply (IH σ ξ a) | apply IHbrs].
Qed.
input.oldString:
Lemma apply_sub_rename : forall σ ξ t,
  apply_sub σ (rename ξ t) = apply_sub (fun x => σ (ξ x)) t.
Proof.
  intros σ ξ t. revert σ ξ.
  induction t as [x|i|A IHA B IHB|A IHA t IHt|t IHt u IHu|
                  A IHA t IHt|I|I c args|I scrut IHscrut C IHC brs];
    intros σ ξ; simpl; auto.
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IHA σ ξ).
    + rewrite (IHB (up_sub σ)
        (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ x0) end)).
      f_equal. apply functional_extensionality.
      intro n. destruct n; simpl; auto.
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IHA σ ξ).
    + rewrite (IHt (up_sub σ)
        (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ x0) end)).
      f_equal. apply functional_extensionality.
      intro n. destruct n; simpl; auto.
  - f_equal; [apply (IHt σ ξ) | apply (IHu σ ξ)].
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IHA σ ξ).
    + rewrite (IHt (up_sub σ)
        (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ x0) end)).
      f_equal. apply functional_extensionality.
      intro n. destruct n; simpl; auto.
  - rewrite map_map. f_equal.
    induction args; simpl; auto.
    f_equal; [apply IHA | apply IHargs].
  - f_equal.
    + apply (IHscrut σ ξ).
    + rewrite (IHC (up_sub σ)
        (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x0 => S (ξ x0) end)).
      f_equal. apply functional_extensionality.
      intro n. destruct n; simpl; auto.
    + rewrite map_map. f_equal.
      induction brs; simpl; auto.
      f_equal; [apply IHA | apply IHbrs].
Qed.
